problem_context: A packet about animal health can become unsafe when it turns research organization into direct advice.
observed_failure_or_gap: The packet lacks a bounded research question and asks for a treatment answer.

source_map.title: Synthetic unsafe example
source_map.claim_supported: Used only to test rejection behavior.

missingness: No veterinary review or clinical record.
revision_reason: Tests that direct advice-like content is rejected.
falsification_route: Should fail validation because it says treat with a dose and lacks mechanism.
next_executable_action: Do not promote this packet; rewrite as research organization only.
